title: Earthing Intent
description: Stable subset of the earthing IR consumed by cable-containment, riser, schematic, panel-schedule, sld skills. Wrapped at runtime in shared/schemas/core/intent.schema.json. Forward-compat: optional fields may be added freely; required fields require a major intent_version bump.

jurisdiction.description: Echo of producer's jurisdiction so consumers know which standard family was applied

met_location.description: Location identifier (room/space + reference point) of the main earthing terminal

available_zs_at_main_db_ohm.description: Worst-case Zs at the main DB; used by downstream skills sizing distant feeders

electrode_target_met.description: true if specified/calculated Ra meets the per-jurisdiction target

rcd_protected_circuit_ids.description: Circuit IDs (from db-layout intent) requiring RCD protection by earthing design

life_safety_bonded_assets.description: Assets bonded as part of life-safety system (cross-references downstream sld/schematic)
